name: linkedin-headcount-actor
title: LinkedIn Headcount Growth Detector
description: Tracks LinkedIn company headcount over time and emits signals when growth exceeds a threshold

input.title: Input
input.description: LinkedIn company URLs and threshold settings for headcount growth detection.

companyUrls.title: Company URLs
companyUrls.description: List of LinkedIn company profile URLs to monitor.

minHeadcountDeltaPct.title: Minimum headcount delta percentage
minHeadcountDeltaPct.description: Minimum percentage growth to trigger a signal.
